since_last: 59% of 86 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +1.91%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 59% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.44% · BTC +0.02% · Gold -1.80% · Nasdaq100 -3.29%. 59% of 86 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +1.91%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +1.91%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.45%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CEVA is the standout at +5.54%
cards.body: Leaders: CEVA +5.54%, MU +4.31%, ARM +4.15%, MRVL +2.40%, VRT +2.08%. Laggards: EQIX -4.12%, PLTR -1.80%, SAP -1.77%, NOW -1.58%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.22% at $154.21
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.22% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
